name: Warabeya Nichiyo Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Warabeya Nichiyo Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells ready-to-eat meals for convenience stores in Japan, China, the United States, and Thailand. The company offers cooked rice products, bento meal boxes, onigiri rice balls and sushi, and chilled bento meal boxes; and bread products, side dishes and noodles, and chilled Japanese sweets. It also provides logistics, and temporary staffing and contracting services; and sells food processing machines. The company was formerly known as Warabeya Nichiyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Warabeya Nichiyo Holdings Co., Ltd. in September 2016. Warabeya Nichiyo Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
